meta.title: Media | Dr. C. Joscky Ibrahim AHO
meta.description: Discover the public interventions, academic conferences, seminars and media contributions of Dr. C. Joscky Ibrahim AHO on regional integration, management and development in Africa.

hero.title: Media & Appearances
hero.description: This section brings together a selection of public interventions, academic conferences, professional seminars and scientific contributions in which I have participated as a speaker or presenter.

talks.section_description: I regularly participate in international academic conferences, professional workshops and forums on regional integration, strategic management, governance and socio-economic development in Africa.

talk1.title: Mobilisation of Islamic Green Finance — MEF Training Seminar
talk1.description: Simultaneous booth interpretation at a training seminar for agents of the Ministry of Economy and Finance of Benin, on the theme of Islamic green finance mobilisation, funded by the Turkish Government.
talk1.link_aria: View details of the Islamic green finance seminar — MEF Benin, November 2025
talk1.img_alt: Training seminar on Islamic green finance mobilisation — MEF Benin, November 2025

talk2.title: 5th International Conference on Arts, Sciences, Cultures and Technologies for the Socio-Economic Development of Nations
talk2.description: Participation with article submission and thematic panel presentation at the 5th International Conference of UAC, focusing on the socio-economic development of African nations.
talk2.link_aria: View details of the 5th International UAC Conference 2017
talk2.img_alt: 5th International Conference on Arts, Sciences, Cultures and Technologies — UAC, 2017

talk3.title: 4th International Conference of the University of Parakou — Scientific Research as a Pillar of the Social Responsibility of Universities
talk3.description: Participation with article submission and thematic panel presentation at the 4th International Conference of the University of Parakou, on the theme of the social responsibility of universities and the role of scientific research in development.
talk3.link_aria: View details of the 4th International Conference of the University of Parakou 2018
talk3.img_alt: 4th International Conference of the University of Parakou — November 2018

talk4.title: 6th International Conference on Arts, Sciences, Cultures and Technologies for the Socio-Economic Development of Nations
talk4.description: Participation with article submission and thematic panel presentation at the 6th International Conference of UAC, focused on arts, sciences, cultures and technologies in service of the socio-economic development of nations.
talk4.link_aria: View details of the 6th International UAC Conference 2015
talk4.img_alt: 6th International Conference on Arts, Sciences, Cultures and Technologies — UAC, 2015

talk5.title: Annual Borderless Conference — Regional Integration through the Development of Trade and Transport
talk5.description: Participation in the Alliance Borderless annual conference, dedicated to the challenges of regional integration in West Africa through the development of cross-border trade and transport infrastructure.
talk5.link_aria: View details of the Borderless Conference 2016
talk5.img_alt: Annual Borderless Conference on regional integration — Cotonou, May 2016
